summary: Cavallo BFB Cushion Pads, sold in pairs: 10mm microcellular foam removable insoles for BFB hoof boots (sizes 7-10), aimed at laminitis, founder, and hoof rehab.
Cavallo Comfort Sleeve, sold in pairs: adjustable one-size sleeves worn over the pastern to prevent rubbing during daily use, turnout, rehab, or break-in with any regular Cavallo hoof boot.
Heller 14" Black Master rasp (out of stock): a finely toothed, coated, wear-resistant rasp suited to hard, dry hooves and horses exposed to sand and mud.
Mustad Rasp Handle: a screw-on plastic handle that fits the rasps Cavallo sells and many other brands.
Mustad Hoof Knife (Right): an ergonomically balanced right-handed hoof knife with a small-radius hook for trimming the sole, frog, bar, and removing abscesses.
Mustad Hoof Knife (Left): an ergonomically balanced left-handed hoof knife with a small-radius hook for trimming the sole, frog, bar, and removing abscesses.
Mustad Hoof Shield: an 8oz all-natural hoof sealant that maintains hoof moisture, prevents cracking and soft hooves, fills nail holes against fungus, and gives a show-ring shine.
Mustad ComfortMix Thrush Treatment: a 2oz thin-gel, chemical-free treatment that fights thrush, white line disease, yeast, and bacteria with a pinpoint applicator nozzle.
The Cavallo Barefoot Trim Manual: a trimming guide by farrier Lynn Seeley sharing 60+ years of experience in barefoot trimming and treating founder and laminitis.
Heller GR8AT Red Tang 14" rasp: a fine-tooth, 8-teeth-per-row rasp that glides easily for steady, even horn removal on hard, dry hooves.
Hoof Pick: a grooming tool for cleaning debris, mud, snow, and rocks from a horse's hoof.
LED Flashlight: a small LED torch with a key chain for convenience; colours may vary.
